response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced senior developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and focus on high-scale, complex systems may not align perfectly with a junior/mid-level role in renewable energy/construction tech. His technical skills are well beyond the requirements, but cultural fit and interest in the domain are less clear.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, exceeding job requirements.
Proven track record in scalable systems and open-source contributions, demonstrating strong architectural skills.
Diverse technical background including AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM integration, covering many nice-to-have qualifications.
concerns: Overqualified for the role, which may lead to misaligned expectations or short tenure.
Lack of explicit experience or interest in renewable energy/construction tech domain.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current senior roles at global tech companies.
